input.memoryNote: You kept me believing in Santa until I was 12 by creating a Hotmail account called northpoledirect99@hotmail.com and sending typed email replies every December. I found out in high school and I still respect the commitment.

meta.tiktokHook: My brother kept me believing in Santa until age 12 using a Hotmail account called northpoledirect99. That's 12 years of lies. Happy birthday to him.
